benchmark_flux_dft_gate.reason: same-contract private TFSF-style uniform reference is implemented, but private uniform/subgrid vacuum parity and transverse-uniformity gates remain inconclusive; the private tau-sensitivity energy-transfer repair sweep found no material repair, so slab R/T scoring is intentionally skipped and public DFT/flux/TFSF/true-R/T promotion remains closed. The private SAT face-coupling theory/redesign stage now records paired_face_coupling_design_ready: a test-local same-step paired E/H candidate closes the manufactured face ledger with normalized residual 0.000577728, preserves matched-trace/zero-work gates, keeps coupling strength near the current kernel, and requires paired E/H face context. Production sbp_sat_3d.py, runner, hook, API, SimResult, Result, default tau, and public observable surfaces remain closed. That planned implementation lane has now been attempted by the private paired-face helper gate. The private paired-face helper implementation gate now records production_context_mismatch_detected: both CPML and non-CPML step paths apply H SAT before E update and E SAT after E update, so the selected same-step paired E/H candidate lacks a single co-temporal pre/post current-SAT ledger state without time-centered staging. Production sbp_sat_3d.py, runner, hook, API, SimResult, Result, default tau, and public observable surfaces remain closed. The next safe lane is private time-centered SAT staging redesign ralplan. The private time-centered E/H face-ledger staging redesign now records time_centered_staging_contract_ready: same-call H_pre/H_post and E_pre/E_post staging with a centered-H face ledger closes the private manufactured ledger, passes the production-expressibility gate with named CPML and non-CPML local slots, uses FACE_ORIENTATIONS only, rejects non-selected candidates with explicit staging/reordering/state-carry reasons, and leaves production sbp_sat_3d.py, runner, hook, API, SimResult, Result, default tau, and public observable surfaces closed. The next safe lane is private time-centered paired-face helper implementation ralplan; public promotion remains closed. The private time-centered paired-face helper implementation now records private_time_centered_paired_face_helper_implemented: bounded private helper functions and direct CPML/non-CPML call-site wiring capture same-call H_pre/H_post and E_pre/E_post face traces, apply the selected same_call_centered_h_bar centered-H correction after E SAT, use FACE_ORIENTATIONS only, change solver-internal behavior inside the experimental SBP-SAT path, and keep runner, hook, API, SimResult, Result, default tau, DFT/flux/TFSF/port/S-parameter/true-R/T, and other public observable surfaces closed. The next safe lane is private time-centered paired-face helper fixture-quality recovery ralplan; public promotion remains closed. The helper uses a predeclared bounded 0.02 relaxation on the same-call centered-H amplitude to preserve existing private proxy-regression gates while still applying the private solver-internal correction. benchmark_flux_dft_gate.next_prerequisite: private measurement-contract/interface-floor redesign after helper recovery failed ralplan
benchmark_flux_dft_gate.diagnostic_basis: private +z ex/hy incident fields are injected through private post-H/post-E slots and accumulated only through private fine-owned flux/DFT planes; the same-contract uniform reference helper is benchmark-only, remains not public TFSF, and does not expose public flux, DFT, S-parameter, port, or true R/T observables The time-centered staging gate is private diagnostic evidence only: it proves a same-call local production-expressibility contract for a later private implementation attempt, not public true R/T, DFT, flux, TFSF, port, or S-parameter support. Private implementation evidence records bounded same-call centered-H helper wiring in sbp_sat_3d.py for both CPML and non-CPML paths; it is not public TFSF/DFT/flux/port/S-parameter/true-R/T evidence, so public promotion remains closed. The helper uses a predeclared bounded 0.02 relaxation on the same-call centered-H amplitude to preserve existing private proxy-regression gates while still applying the private solver-internal correction. The private helper fixture-quality recovery ladder is finite and private-only; even C1/C2 measurement-control improvements cannot claim original fixture recovery, and C3 was rolled back rather than retained as a public or configurable helper switch.
